data.current_description: Get all ZIP codes for a US state. Charged as multiple requests (every 10 ZIP codes = 1 request).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all ZIP codes for a specified US state. Returns a complete list of ZIP codes within that state. Note: This operation is charged as multiple requests based on result volume (every 10 ZIP codes returned equals 1 API request charge). Useful for bulk ZIP code data retrieval at the state level.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions billing implications but lacks clarity about what is actually returned and when an AI agent should use this versus city-level lookups. Enhanced description clarifies the return value (complete list of ZIP codes), explains the billing model more clearly, and provides context about use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getRadiusSql' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies: (1) what coordinate inputs are needed, (2) the distance and unit parameters, (3) the database field name parameters, (4) the exact output format (SQL WHERE clause string), (5) the precision parameter's purpose, and (6) practical use case context. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation versus the standard radius search endpoint, and what parameters are required.

data.current_summary: Generate SQL WHERE clause for radius search
data.current_description: Generate a SQL WHERE clause for finding records within a radius of given coordinates.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate SQL WHERE clause for radius queries
data.description_suggestion: Generates a SQL WHERE clause for querying records within a specified radius of given geographic coordinates. Accepts latitude, longitude, distance value, and unit specifications (miles or kilometers), along with the latitude and longitude field names from your database table. Returns a ready-to-use SQL WHERE clause string that can be appended to SELECT statements. Precision parameter controls decimal place rounding in the generated SQL. Useful for integrating radius-based geographic filtering into custom database queries.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies: (1) what coordinate inputs are needed, (2) the distance and unit parameters, (3) the database field name parameters, (4) the exact output format (SQL WHERE clause string), (5) the precision parameter's purpose, and (6) practical use case context. This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation versus the standard radius search endpoint, and what parameters are required.

data.current_summary: Distances from one ZIP code to multiple others
data.current_description: Calculate distances from a base ZIP code to up to 100 other ZIP codes. Each ZIP code counts as a separate request.
data.description_suggestion: Calculate distances from a base ZIP code to up to 100 other ZIP codes in a single request. Returns a collection of distance values, one for each target ZIP code. Each ZIP code in the request counts as a separate billable request against your API quota.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about the return format (collection of distances) and doesn't adequately explain the billing/quota implication of the 'counts as separate request' statement. Added explicit output format and clarified the quota impact for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getZipCodesInRadius' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description mentions a 500-mile cap and 'minimal option' but doesn't explain what the minimal option does or what the default output includes. Added clarity about output format (collection with location details) and the purpose of the minimal option for better AI agent understanding of available options.

data.current_description: Find all ZIP codes within a given radius of a ZIP code. Capped at 500 miles unless minimal option is used.
data.description_suggestion: Find all ZIP codes within a specified radius of a center ZIP code. Returns a collection of ZIP codes and their location details. Default radius limit is 500 miles; use the minimal option to retrieve only ZIP codes without detailed location information to exceed this limit.
data.reasoning: Description mentions a 500-mile cap and 'minimal option' but doesn't explain what the minimal option does or what the default output includes. Added clarity about output format (collection with location details) and the purpose of the minimal option for better AI agent understanding of available options.
